questions.description: The recommended scope keeps the work grounded in the Option+R latency problem while leaving room for the CosyVoice-ready abstraction.
questions.recommendedAnswer: Include benchmark scripts, Raycast streaming playback for tts-gateway, gateway stream first-chunk tuning, tests for streaming behavior, and a final streaming-engine abstraction plan that can support CosyVoice elegantly. Do not implement CosyVoice itself unless the baseline streaming work plateaus and a separate prototype proves it is worth the operational cost.

questions.prompt: What should count as success for latency?
questions.description: These targets are meant as optimization gates, not brittle unit-test thresholds.
questions.recommendedAnswer: Use repeatable benchmark output as the source of truth. For warm Kokoro on this Mac, target end-to-end first audible audio at roughly <=400ms for short snippets, <=700ms for sentence-length text, and at least a 30% server TTFA improvement for long selections versus the current /tts/stream baseline. Preserve total playback time unless a tradeoff is explicitly documented.

questions.prompt: Which fallback behavior should be preserved?
questions.description: Streaming should not break existing non-default preferences or generic TTS-server support.
questions.recommendedAnswer: Preserve the current buffered path for custom endpoints, missing ffplay, save-audio mode, speed changes, output-format conversion, and any failed streaming setup. Stop Audio should terminate playback and abort the in-flight stream request.

questions.prompt: How should CosyVoice appear in this goal?
questions.description: The clean design is likely a sidecar-backed streaming engine capability, but that can be planned separately from actually operating the model.
questions.recommendedAnswer: Make the final phase define and test a capability-based streaming engine abstraction that can host CosyVoice as a sidecar-backed engine. Include a prototype plan and acceptance gates, but defer full CosyVoice implementation until tuned Kokoro streaming has been benchmarked.
